## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Docs / config
- [ ] CI/CD

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Manually verified in browser (`npm run dev` + `uvicorn`)
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes (backend)
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes (backend)
- [ ] `mypy app` passes (backend)
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes (backend)
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (frontend)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (frontend)
